_meta.purpose: Opening sentences in English for Brite Smile Dental Care. Natural, casual patient voice — not corporate. Dental anxiety → relief is the core emotion. Single-doctor clinic (Dr. Priyank Prakash).
rules: Real patient writing style — not an ad
Vary length — short punchy and longer storytelling both
Dental fear angle is strong — many patients avoid dentists for years
Never reference 'multiple dentists' — this is a single-doctor clinic
